phrases.intent_en: Ask where to park the car
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la entrada del aparcamiento más cercano?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah en-TRAH-dah del ah-pah-rah-mee-EN-toh mahs ser-KAH-noh?

likely_response.local: Siga las señales azules, abajo a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs ah-THOO-lehs ah-BAH-hoh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the blue signs, down to the left.

responses.english: Follow the blue signs, down to the left.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs ah-THOO-lehs ah-BAH-hoh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Siga las señales azules, abajo a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which dock has the biggest yachts
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿en qué muelle están los yates más grandes?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, ehn keh MWAY-yeh eh-STAHN lohs YAH-tehs mahs GRAHN-dehs?

likely_response.local: En el muelle central, zona de amarres profundos.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moo-EHL-leh thehnt-RAHL THOH-nah DEH ah-MAHR-rehs proh-FOON-dohs
likely_response.translation_en: At the central dock, deep mooring area.

responses.english: At the central dock, deep mooring area.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moo-EHL-leh thehnt-RAHL THOH-nah DEH ah-MAHR-rehs proh-FOON-dohs
responses.french: En el muelle central, zona de amarres profundos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the yacht tour tickets are sold
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se venden los tickets para los tours en yate?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh seh BEN-den lohs bee-YEH-tohs PAH-rah lohs toors ehn YAH-teh?

likely_response.local: En la caseta azul junto al Muelle 3.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH kah-SEH-tah ah-THOOL HOON-toh AHL moo-EHL-leh
likely_response.translation_en: At the blue booth, near the dock.

responses.english: At the blue booth, near the dock.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH kah-SEH-tah ah-THOOL HOON-toh AHL moo-EHL-leh
responses.french: En la caseta azul junto al Muelle 3.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find luxury watch shops
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde encuentro las tiendas de relojes de lujo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh ehn-KWEHN-troh lahs tee-EHN-dahs deh reh-LOH-jehs deh LOO-hoh?

likely_response.local: En Muelle Ribera, junto a Rolex.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN moo-EHL-leh ree-BEH-rah HOON-toh AH roh-LEHKS
likely_response.translation_en: In the commercial zone, opposite the port.

responses.english: In the commercial zone, opposite the port.
responses.phonetic: EHN moo-EHL-leh ree-BEH-rah HOON-toh AH roh-LEHKS
responses.french: En Muelle Ribera, junto a Rolex.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a taxi stand nearby
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿hay una parada de taxis cerca de aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: dis-KOOL-peh, AH-ee OO-nah pa-RAH-dah deh TAK-sees KYER-kah deh ah-KEE?

likely_response.local: En la entrada principal del puerto.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL DEHL poo-EHR-toh
likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance of the port.

responses.english: At the main entrance of the port.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL DEHL poo-EHR-toh
responses.french: En la entrada principal del puerto.
